parameters.description: Enter a dotnetup version to filter, or leave empty for all

tiles.title: Success Rate Overview
tiles.markdownText: Success rate excludes user errors (invalid input, permissions, disk full, network issues). Only product issues count against quality.

tiles.title: Product Success Rate by Command & Version
Product Success Rate Over Time (by Version)
Product Success Rate Over Time (by Command)
Product Errors
tiles.markdownText: Product errors are bugs, crashes, and server issues we can take action on.

tiles.title: User Errors (UX Opportunities)
tiles.markdownText: User errors indicate user confusion or environmental issues — opportunities to improve documentation, validation, or error messages.

queries.text:
RawEventsTraces
| where TimeGenerated between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where Message startswith "dotnet/cli/command/"
| extend is_dev = tobool(Properties["dev.build"])
| extend version = coalesce(tostring(Properties["dotnetup.version"]), ProductVersion)
| extend command = tostring(Properties["command.name"])
| extend error_category = tostring(Properties["error.category"])
| extend is_success = Properties["command.status"] == "ok"
| extend duration_ms = todouble(Properties["command.duration_ms"])
| where (isempty(_versionFilter) or version == _versionFilter)
| where (isempty(['_devBuild']) or is_dev == tobool(['_devBuild']))

RawEventsTraces
| where TimeGenerated between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where Message startswith "dotnet/cli/"
| where tostring(Properties["caller"]) == "dotnetup"
| extend is_dev = tobool(Properties["dev.build"])
| extend version = coalesce(tostring(Properties["dotnetup.version"]), ProductVersion)
| where (isempty(_versionFilter) or version == _versionFilter)
| where (isempty(['_devBuild']) or is_dev == tobool(['_devBuild']))

let filteredData = _dotnetupCommands;
let versions = filteredData
| where isnotempty(version)
| distinct version
| order by version desc
| take 2
| extend rank = row_number();
let latestVersion = toscalar(versions | where rank == 1 | project version);
let priorVersion = toscalar(versions | where rank == 2 | project version);
let latestStats = filteredData
| where version == latestVersion
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Successful = countif(is_success),
    ProductErrors = countif(not(is_success) and (error_category == "product" or isempty(error_category))),
    UserErrors = countif(not(is_success) and error_category == "user")
| extend
    Relevant = Total - UserErrors,
    SuccessRate = round(100.0 * Successful / (Total - UserErrors), 1),
    Version = latestVersion,
    Label = "Latest";
let priorStats = filteredData
| where version == priorVersion and isnotempty(priorVersion)
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Successful = countif(is_success),
    ProductErrors = countif(not(is_success) and (error_category == "product" or isempty(error_category))),
    UserErrors = countif(not(is_success) and error_category == "user")
| extend
    Relevant = Total - UserErrors,
    SuccessRate = round(100.0 * Successful / (Total - UserErrors), 1),
    Version = priorVersion,
    Label = "Prior";
latestStats
| union priorStats
| where isnotempty(Version)
| project Label, Version, SuccessRate, Relevant, Successful, ProductErrors, UserErrors
| order by Label asc

_dotnetupCommands
| where isnotempty(command)
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Successful = countif(is_success),
    ProductErrors = countif(not(is_success) and (error_category == "product" or isempty(error_category))),
    UserErrors = countif(not(is_success) and error_category == "user")
    by command, version
| where version != "unknown" or Total >= 25
| extend Relevant = Total - UserErrors,
    SuccessRate = round(100.0 * Successful / (Total - UserErrors), 1)
| order by command asc, version desc
| project Command = command, Version = version, SuccessRate, Relevant, Successful, ProductErrors, UserErrors

_dotnetupCommands
| where isnotempty(version)
| where not(not(is_success) and error_category == "user")
| summarize Total = count(), Successful = countif(is_success) by Day = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), version
| where Total > 0
| extend SuccessRate = round(100.0 * Successful / Total, 1)
| project Day, version, SuccessRate
| order by Day asc, version desc

_dotnetupCommands
| where isnotempty(command)
| where not(not(is_success) and error_category == "user")
| summarize Total = count(), Successful = countif(is_success) by Day = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), command
| where Total > 0
| extend SuccessRate = round(100.0 * Successful / Total, 1)
| project Day, command, SuccessRate
| order by Day asc, command asc

_dotnetupCommands
| count

_dotnetupCommands
| where isnotempty(command)
| summarize Count = count() by command
| order by Count desc

_dotnetupCommands
| where isnotempty(command)
| summarize Count = count() by Day = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), command

_dotnetupCommands
| extend os = tostring(Properties["os.platform"])
| where isnotempty(os)
| summarize Count = count() by os

_dotnetupCommands
| extend arch = tostring(Properties["process.arch"])
| where isnotempty(arch)
| summarize Count = count() by arch

_dotnetupCommands
| extend ci = tostring(Properties["ci.detected"])
| where isnotempty(ci)
| summarize Count = count() by CI_Environment = iif(ci == "true" or ci == "True", "CI/CD", "Interactive")

_dotnetupCommands
| extend os = tostring(Properties["os.platform"])
| where isnotempty(os)
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    SuccessRate = round(100.0 * countif(is_success) / count(), 1)
    by os
| order by Total desc
| project OS = os, Total, SuccessRate

_dotnetupCommands
| where Message == "dotnet/cli/command/runtime/install"
| extend component = coalesce(tostring(Properties["install.component"]), "Runtime")
| summarize Count = count() by component

_dotnetupCommands
| where Message startswith "dotnet/cli/command/" and Message endswith "/install"
| extend path_source = coalesce(tostring(Properties["install.path_source"]), "unknown")
| summarize Count = count() by path_source

_dotnetupCommands
| where Message startswith "dotnet/cli/command/" and Message endswith "/install"
| extend path_type = coalesce(tostring(Properties["install.path_type"]), "unknown")
| summarize Count = count() by path_type

_dotnetupCommands
| where Message startswith "dotnet/cli/command/" and Message endswith "/install"
| extend result = coalesce(tostring(Properties["install.result"]), iif(is_success, "success", "failed"))
| summarize Count = count() by result

_dotnetupCommands
| where Message == "dotnet/cli/command/sdk/install"
| extend version = coalesce(tostring(Properties["download.version"]), tostring(Properties["dotnet.requested"]), "unknown")
| where isnotempty(version) and version != "unknown"
| summarize Count = count() by version
| order by Count desc
| take 20

_dotnetupCommands
| where Message == "dotnet/cli/command/runtime/install"
| extend version = coalesce(tostring(Properties["download.version"]), tostring(Properties["dotnet.requested"]), "unknown")
| where isnotempty(version) and version != "unknown"
| summarize Count = count() by version
| order by Count desc
| take 20

_dotnetupCommands
| where Message in ("dotnet/cli/command/sdk/install", "dotnet/cli/command/runtime/install")
| extend requested = tostring(Properties["dotnet.requested"]),
    source = tostring(Properties["dotnet.request_source"])
| extend display_requested = case(
    source == "default-latest", "(default: latest)",
    source == "default-globaljson", strcat("(global.json: ", requested, ")"),
    source == "explicit" and isnotempty(requested), requested,
    isnotempty(requested), requested,
    isnotempty(source), strcat("(", source, ")"),
    "(no request data)")
| summarize Count = count() by display_requested
| order by Count desc
| take 15

_dotnetupCommands
| where Message in ("dotnet/cli/command/sdk/install", "dotnet/cli/command/runtime/install")
| extend source = coalesce(tostring(Properties["dotnet.request_source"]), "unknown")
| summarize Count = count() by source

_dotnetupCommands
| where not(is_success)
| where error_category == "product" or isempty(error_category)
| extend error_type = coalesce(tostring(Properties["error.type"]), "(no error.type)")
| extend error_code = tostring(Properties["error.code"])
| extend display_error = iif(error_type == "Exception" and isnotempty(error_code) and error_code != "Exception", error_code, error_type)
| summarize Count = count() by display_error
| order by Count desc

_dotnetupCommands
| where not(is_success)
| extend error_type = tostring(Properties["error.type"]),
    http_status = tostring(Properties["error.http_status"])
| where error_category == "product" or isempty(error_category)
| where isnotempty(http_status)
| summarize Count = count() by http_status, error_type
| order by Count desc
| project HTTPStatus = http_status, ErrorType = error_type, Count

_dotnetupCommands
| where not(is_success)
| where error_category == "product" or isempty(error_category)
| extend error_type = tostring(Properties["error.type"]),
    error_details = tostring(Properties["error.details"]),
    hresult = tostring(Properties["error.hresult"]),
    os = tostring(Properties["os.platform"])
| summarize Count = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by error_type, error_details, hresult, os, version
| order by Count desc
| take 25
| project ErrorType = error_type, ErrorDetails = error_details, Count, LastSeen, hresult, os, version

_dotnetupCommands
| where not(is_success)
| extend stack_trace = tostring(Properties["error.stack_trace"]),
    error_type = tostring(Properties["error.type"])
| where error_category == "product" or isempty(error_category)
| where isnotempty(stack_trace)
| summarize Count = count() by stack_trace, error_type
| order by Count desc
| take 20
| project StackTrace = stack_trace, ErrorType = error_type, Count

_dotnetupCommands
| where not(is_success)
| where error_category == "product" or isempty(error_category)
| extend error_type = tostring(Properties["error.type"])
| where isnotempty(error_type)
| summarize Count = count() by error_type
| order by Count desc
| take 20
| project ErrorType = error_type, Count

_dotnetupCommands
| where not(is_success)
| where error_category == "user"
| extend error_type = coalesce(tostring(Properties["error.type"]), "Unknown")
| summarize Count = count() by error_type

_dotnetupCommands
| where not(is_success)
| where error_category == "user"
| extend error_type = tostring(Properties["error.type"]),
    error_details = tostring(Properties["error.details"]),
    os = tostring(Properties["os.platform"])
| summarize Count = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by error_type, error_details, os, version
| order by Count desc
| take 25
| project ErrorType = error_type, ErrorDetails = error_details, Count, LastSeen, os, version

_dotnetupCommands
| where is_success
| where isnotempty(command) and isnotnull(duration_ms)
| summarize
    Count = count(),
    P50 = percentile(duration_ms, 50),
    P90 = percentile(duration_ms, 90),
    P99 = percentile(duration_ms, 99),
    Avg = avg(duration_ms)
    by command
| project Command = command,
    Count,
    P50_ms = round(P50, 0),
    P90_ms = round(P90, 0),
    P99_ms = round(P99, 0),
    Avg_ms = round(Avg, 0)

// Note: download/extract sub-span events are not currently emitted as ActivityEvents.
// This query uses install/complete events which carry download metadata.
_dotnetupAll
| where Message == "dotnet/cli/install/complete"
| extend from_cache = tostring(Properties["download.from_cache"]),
    bytes = todouble(Properties["download.bytes"])
| summarize
    TotalInstalls = count(),
    CacheHits = countif(from_cache == "true" or from_cache == "True"),
    AvgSizeMB = round(avg(bytes) / 1048576, 2)
| extend CacheHitRate = round(100.0 * CacheHits / TotalInstalls, 1)
| project TotalInstalls, CacheHits, CacheHitRate, AvgSizeMB

_dotnetupCommands
| extend device_id = tostring(Properties["device.id"])
| summarize
    UniqueDevices = dcount(device_id),
    TotalCommands = count()
| project UniqueDevices, TotalCommands, AvgCommandsPerDevice = round(1.0 * TotalCommands / UniqueDevices, 1)

_dotnetupCommands
| extend device_id = tostring(Properties["device.id"])
| where isnotempty(version)
| summarize UniqueDevices = dcount(device_id) by Day = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), version
| order by Day asc, version desc

_dotnetupCommands
| extend device_id = tostring(Properties["device.id"])
| summarize UniqueDevices = dcount(device_id) by Day = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
